sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἀχείμ

- Transliteration: Acheim

- Phonetic: akh-ime'

- Definition: Achim = "the Lord will establish"

1. one of the ancestors of Christ, his name is not mentioned in the OT

- Origin: probably of hebrew origin cf H3137

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Probably of hebrew origin (compare [H3137]); Achim an Israelite: - Achim.
